selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":53,"biological_sex":"female","gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"homosexual","occupation":"chef","city_of_living":"Milan","employment_status":"self-employed","education_level":"PhD","parents_education":{"parent_1":"bachelor's degree","parent_2":"master's degree"},"marital_status":"in a relationship","children":1,"migration_status":"native Italian","psychological_feature":"anxious","religious_beliefs":"Agnostic","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend a few times monthly on social media","hobbies":["rock climbing","photography","reading novels","board games"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":2,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":87,"level":"high"},"extraversion":{"score":23,"level":"low"},"agreeableness":{"score":41,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":80,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "As a 53-year-old woman, I've seen my fair share of fake content on social media. From catfish accounts to fake news stories, it can be overwhelming and difficult to know what to trust. Here are some tips on how to manage and deal with fake content on social media:",
"reasoning_summary": "To identify fake content on social media, I use a combination of fact-checking websites and my own critical thinking skills. I also try to verify the information by cross-referencing it with other sources. Additionally, I have set up my social media accounts to only show me local news and sources that I trust. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a 53-year-old woman, I've seen my fair share of fake content on social media. From catfish accounts to fake news stories, it can be overwhelming and difficult to know what to trust. Here are some tips on how to manage and deal with fake content on social media:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To identify fake content on social media, I use a combination of fact-checking websites and my own critical thinking skills. I also try to verify the information by cross-referencing it with other sources. Additionally, I have set up my social media accounts to only show me local news and sources that I trust. This way, I can avoid coming across fake content in the first place.
